hero.eyebrow: Serivisi y'ingenzi yo gutwara mu Michigan · kuva 2014
hero.body: Abyride itanga serivisi yo gutwara abarwayi batangirwa imiti, imodoka zifasha abantu batwara intebe z'amakofa, gutwara ku ndege, n'ingendo za buri munsi — hamwe. Ikorera iminsi yose, irishyurwa n'ubwishingizi, igakorwa n'abantu bafite ubumenyi buteye.
widget.title: Tuzagutaha he?
partners.label: Twemejwe n'ubutabazi bw'ubuzima bwa Michigan
services.s01.title: Gutwara abarwayi batari mu makuba
services.s01.tag: Mu gihe, mu buryo busanzwe, ku gahunda imwe buri cyumweru.
services.s01.body: Dialyze, kuvura kanseri, gusubira imbaraga. Dukorana na muyobozi w'ikibazo cyawe kandi tukishyura MDHHS / Medicaid / Molina / Meridian — nta mpapuro ku ruhande rwawe.
services.s02.title: Imodoka zifasha abafite ubumuga
services.s02.tag: Imodoka zujuje amategeko ya ADA mu migi itandatu.
services.s02.body: Inzira zo ku ruhande no inyuma, elevatori y'imyanya ibiri, gufunga ku ntego enye. Umushoferi wese yigishijwe uburyo bwo gutwara neza kandi asubiramo imyaka yose.
services.s03.title: Gutwara ku ndege
services.s03.tag: Ingendo zikurikirana indege kuri DTW, GRR na FNT.
services.s03.body: Gufata inzira ku kibuga cy'indege. Abashoferi bavuga indimi nyinshi bisabwa. Ibiciro birambye ku gihe cyo gufata — nta kondariya, nta guhinduka niba indege yawe yatinze.
services.s04.title: Guhindura ururimi mu gihe nyacyo
services.s04.body: Guhindura ururimi mu modoka mu Kiamhara, Icyarabu, Ispanye, Igifaransa, Ururimi rw'amaboko n'izindi icyenda. Umusimbuzi wa videwo bisabwa ku zindi ndimi, bishobora kwishyurwa n'ubwishingizi bw'ubuzima.
services.s05.title: Ingendo za buri munsi
services.s05.tag: Kujya akazi, gukora imirimo, gutwara abana ku ishuri.
services.s05.body: Ibiciro birambye i Detroit, Ann Arbor, Lansing, Flint, Grand Rapids na Dearborn. Nta kondariya. Ishyura ukoresheje porogaramu cyangwa amafaranga y'inzuzi n'umushoferi.
why.body: Ivyo byiza bikoreshe neza — umutekano, ururimi, ubuzima, umuryango. Ntidukeneye kuvuga byinshi kuko bibiganirwa.
why.01_body: Abashoferi bagenzurwa, GPS ku rugendo rwose, umurongo w'acyitwa wahorana.
why.02_body: Abasimbuzi mu ndimi 14 — Amharique, Icyarabu, Igifaransa, Ispanye, Ururimi rw'amaboko n'izindi.
why.03_body: Kwishyura ubwishingizi buteranye. Gutwara abarwayi bigenzurwa. Imodoka zifasha abafite ubumuga.
why.04_body: Fata urugendo ku mugabo/mugore wawe. Sangira urugendo. Bonera amakuru yo kuza no kugera.
app.body: Fata urugendo, kurikirana umushoferi wawe, subiramo ingendo yaramaze, bwiriza mu rurimi rwawe, cyangwa sangira aho uri n'uwo mu muryango.
app.feat_a_desc: Gufata mu kanda rimwe cyangwa gutegura ibyumweru imbere.
app.feat_b_desc: ETA mu gihe nyacyo · ifoto y'umushoferi · inomero y'imodoka.
app.feat_c_desc: Ohereza link y'urugendo mu gihe nyacyo ku muryango.
app.feat_d_desc: Subiramo ingendo zisubirwamo mu kanda kabiri.
app.feat_e_desc: Hamagara, ikiganiro, cyangwa videwo — mu rurimi rwawe.
news.h2: Porogaramu nshya ya Abyride iraboneka kuri iOS na Android.
news.body: Yakozwe bimwe bimwe — gufata urugendo byihuse, gukurikirana umushoferi mu gihe nyacyo, guhindura ururimi mu porogaramu, ingendo zisubirwamo, n'kwishyura ubwishingizi. Kurura ubuntu, nta konti ikenewe.
success.s01.label: Abakiriya bashimye
success.s01.desc: Abagenzi n'abafata ingendo ku bw'umuryango muri Michigan.
success.s02.label: Igipimo cy'igihe
success.s02.desc: Gipimwa ku kibuga cy'imodoka, kuva mu ntangiriro y'umwaka.
success.s03.label: Serivisi ihoraho
success.s04.label: Imyaka ku muhanda
success.quote: Zizekanye, mu gihe, kandi abashoferi bafata mama nk'umunyamuryango. Nyuma y'imyaka umunani y'ingendo za dialyze, ntibikimbaza transport. Ni ishimwe rikomeye kuruta irindi.
testimonials.featured_quote: Zizekanye cyane, cyane cyane ku birebana n'igihe cy'ubuvuzi. Umushoferi yaje mu gihe kandi yari inzobere — ni cyo nakeneye ku ngendo zanjye zo mu gitondo.
testimonials.t1.name: Steve H.
testimonials.t1.quote: Serivisi nziza cyane y'gutwara igihe nakeneye cyane. Inzobere, mu gihe, kandi ikiganiro cyiza. Urugendo rworoshye kandi rurerure igihe izindi porogaramu zarannaniye.
testimonials.t2.name: Ben R.
testimonials.t2.quote: Ni uko serivisi ya taxi igomba kuba. Ikiganiro kuva ku muryango kugeza ku wundi, uburyo bw'ubwuzu, uburyo bwo sangira n'umushoferi hamwe na serivisi nziza.
blog.sub: Ubumenyi n'amakuru y'inyandiko zacu za vuba. Menya byinshi ku serivisi zacu n'inzira z'inganda.
blog.p1.title: Impamvu serivisi z'ubuvuzi bw'urugo zikenewe mu buzima bwa none
blog.p1.excerpt: Uburyo transport ya buri munsi igena ubwigenge bw'abakuze — n'icyo imiryango ishobora gukora.
blog.p2.title: Inyuma y'igipimo cy'igihe: uburyo dispatch ikorera kuri Abyride
blog.p2.excerpt: Kureba inzira, abadispatch bafite ubumenyi, n'amafishi atamenyekana inyuma ya 99.9%.
blog.p3.title: Gusenya inzitizi z'ururimi: uruhare rwa serivisi yacu yo guhindura ururimi
blog.p3.excerpt: Impamvu umushoferi uvuga indimi nyinshi atari uburyohe ku baza bashya mu Michigan — ni itandukaniro hagati y'urugendo n'kwigizwa mu nkeke.
driver.body: Ingendo za vuba vuba zo kwa muganga, nta kondariya y'ibiciro biratandukanye, n'ikipe y'iyamamaza isubiza. Umushoferi wa kabisa ainjira $1,240 mu cyumweru. Niza n'imodoka yawe cyangwa ize mu imodoka zacu.
driver.disclaimer: Gusaba bikura iminota ~10. Dosiye n'ubwishingizi bisabwa.
driver.stat1_label: Icyiciro cya 7 iminsi · umushoferi wa kabisa
footer.tagline: Serivisi y'ingenzi yo gutwara mu Michigan. Isosiyete y'umuryango kuva 2014.
footer.copyright: © 2014–2026 Abyride LLC · Isosiyete ya Michigan · Uburenganzira bwose bwabitswe.
svc.page_sub: Kuva ku ngendo za dialyze kugeza gutwara ku ndege, buri rugendo rwubakiwe ku muntu urugenda.
svc.s01.desc_long: Serivisi ya Abyride yo gutwara abarwayi batari mu makuba yubakiwe ku barwayi bakeneye gukomeza — dialyze inshuro eshatu mu cyumweru, infusion y'oncologie buri cyumweru, cyangwa seanse za rehab buri munsi. Dukorana na muyobozi w'ikibazo cyawe, twemeza buri gahunda, kandi tukishyura MDHHS, Medicaid, Molina na Meridian mu izina ryawe — nta mpapuro ku ruhande rwawe.
svc.s01.feat1_desc: Tukishyura MDHHS, Medicaid, Molina na Meridian buteranye. Nta gihombo ku ruhande rwawe.
svc.s01.feat2_desc: Dukorana n'ikipe yawe y'ubuvuzi kugira ngo twemeze gahunda no guhindura igihe bibaye ngombwa.
svc.s01.feat3_desc: Shyiraho inzira yawe y'icyumweru rimwe gusa. Tuba aho buri gihe, n'umushoferi umwe niba bishoboka.
svc.s01.feat4_desc: Umushoferi wese afite icyemezo cy'ubufasha ku bagenzi kandi azi ubuvuzi bw'ibanze.
svc.s01.break_quote: Urugendo rwo kujya kwa muganga ntirugomba kuba igice cy'ingorane zo kuvurwa.
svc.s01.break_sub: Twita ku bikorwa kugira ngo abarwayi babone igihe cyo gukira.
svc.s02.desc_long: Imodoka zacu 68 zujuje amategeko ya ADA zubakiwe ku bagenzi batwara intebe z'amakofa, intebe z'amashanyarazi, cyangwa scooter z'ubufasha. Inzira zo ku ruhande no inyuma, elevatori y'imyanya ibiri, n'imiyoboro y'intego enye bitera buri mugenzi gutwara mu mutekano no mu mahoro. Abashoferi bafite ubumenyi bwo gutwara neza kandi basubiramo imyaka yose.
svc.s02.feat1_title: Inzira zo ku Ruhande no Inyuma
svc.s02.feat1_desc: Inzira nyinshi zo kwinjira ku ntebe z'amakofa z'amaboko n'amashanyarazi z'ubunini bwose.
svc.s02.feat2_desc: Elevatori z'amazi zikora ku ntebe z'amashanyarazi n'imodoka nini z'ubufasha.
svc.s02.feat3_desc: Imiyoboro y'inganda igumya intebe yose mu mwanya wayo.
svc.s02.feat4_desc: Umushoferi wese asubiramo icyemezo cye cy'gutwara abafite ubumuga buri mwaka.
svc.s02.break_quote: Ubufasha bwo kugenda ntibugomba guhagarara ku muryango.
svc.s02.break_sub: Imodoka zacu zifasha abafite ubumuga zihari mu migi itandatu ya Michigan, buri munsi w'umwaka.
svc.s03.desc_long: Tukorera Detroit Metro (DTW), Gerald R. Ford (GRR), Bishop International (FNT) na Lansing Capital (LAN) n'ibiciro birambye bivugwa igihe cyo gufata — nta kondariya, nta gihano niba indege yawe yatinze. Abashoferi bakurikirana indege yawe mu gihe nyacyo kandi bahindura igihe cyo kuza neza.
svc.s03.feat1_desc: Umushoferi wawe akurikirana indege yawe mu gihe nyacyo kandi ahindura igihe cyo gufata wenyine.
svc.s03.feat2_desc: Igiciro ubona igihe cyo gufata ni cyo wishyura — nta kondariya, nta mafaranga yihishe.
svc.s03.feat3_desc: Umushoferi akugira aho bageza imizigo n'ikibaho cy'izina ryawe, nta gushakashaka.
svc.s03.feat4_desc: Saba umushoferi uvuga ururimi rwawe igihe ufata.
svc.s03.break_quote: Indege yawe yasaduye. Umushoferi wawe abimenye kare.
svc.s03.break_sub: Gukurikirana indege mu gihe nyacyo bisobanura ko tuba aho igihe cyawe — nta kare, nta guhita.
svc.s04.desc_long: Abyride ni serivisi imwe gusa yo gutwara mu Michigan ifite guhindura ururimi mu modoka bishyizwe mu nzira yo gufata. Hitamo umushoferi uvuga ururimi rwawe — Kiamhara, Icyarabu, Ispanye, Igifaransa, Ururimi rw'amaboko, Kisomali, Ikinyarwanda n'izindi umunani — cyangwa saba umusimbuzi wa videwo bisabwa ku zindi ndimi. Amafaranga y'umusimbuzi ashobora kwishyurwa n'ubwishingizi bw'ubuzima.
svc.s04.feat1_desc: Kiamhara, Icyarabu, Ispanye, Igifaransa, Ururimi rw'amaboko, Kisomali, Ikinyarwanda n'izindi.
svc.s04.feat2_desc: Umushoferi wawe avuga ururimi rwawe — nta telefoni hagati, nta gutegereza.
svc.s04.feat3_desc: Ku ndimi zidahari ku rutonde rwacu, umusimbuzi wa videwo wemejwe ajya mu rugendo.
svc.s04.feat4_desc: Serivisi zo guhindura ururimi zishobora kwishyurwa n'ubwishingizi bw'ubuzima bwa Michigan.
svc.s04.break_quote: Urugendo aho usobanukirwa byose — kandi bose bakusobanukirwa.
svc.s04.break_sub: Ururimi ntirugomba kuba inzitizi yo kubona ubuvuzi ukeneye.
svc.s05.desc_long: Niba ujya akazi i Detroit, ukora imirimo i Ann Arbor, cyangwa utwara abana ku ishuri i Grand Rapids, ingendo za buri munsi za Abyride zitanga ibiciro birambye nta gihombo. Tukorera Detroit, Ann Arbor, Lansing, Flint, Grand Rapids na Dearborn — ishyura ukoresheje porogaramu cyangwa amafaranga y'inzuzi n'umushoferi wawe.
svc.s05.feat1_desc: Menya igiciro cyawe mbere yo gufata. Nta kondariya, nta mafaranga yihishe, na rimwe.
svc.s05.feat2_desc: Detroit, Ann Arbor, Lansing, Flint, Grand Rapids na Dearborn.
svc.s05.feat3_desc: Ishyura ukoresheje porogaramu n'ikarita cyangwa amafaranga y'inzuzi buteranye n'umushoferi wawe.
svc.s05.feat4_desc: Fata ingendo ku bw'abanyamuryango kandi ubonere amakuru yo gufata mu gihe nyacyo.
svc.s05.break_quote: Kugenda ntibugomba gutwara amafaranga menshi ku munsi mubi.
svc.s05.break_sub: Ibiciro birambye bisobanura ko igiciro kimwe igihe cy'amasaha y'akazi cyangwa ku wa kabiri w'imvura.
about.page_sub: Abyride yatangiye n'imodoka imwe, umuryango umwe, n'icyizere kimwe — ko kujya ku muganga ntikigomba kuba impamvu yo gutinya.
about.origin_h2: Imodoka imwe. Umuryango umwe. Isezerano rimwe.
about.origin_body1: Abyride yashinzwe i Detroit mu 2014 n'umuryango Abdi nyuma yo kureba umuturanyi we wibuza urugendo rwa dialyze kuko nta modoka yaje. Icyo gihe cyabaye intangiriro y'isosiyete: gutwara abarwayi neza si uburyohe — ni ubuvuzi.
about.origin_body2: Twatangiye n'imodoka imwe ifasha abafite ubumuga n'inomero ya telefoni. Imyaka cumi n'umwe nyuma, tukorera imodoka 68 mu migi itandatu ya Michigan, dufite abashoferi barenga 120, kandi tukora ingendo z'ubuvuzi zirenga 3,200 buri kwezi.
about.mission_body: Intego yacu ni yoroshye: gukuraho inzitizi zose hagati y'umuntu n'ubuvuzi akeneye. Bisobanura kuza mu gihe, kuvuga ururimi rwawe, kwemera ubwishingizi bwawe, no gufata umugenzi wese neza.
about.values_body: Izi si amagambo y'iyamamaza. Ni ibipimo dukoresheje mu gushaka abashoferi, kubaka ibikorwa, no gufata ibyemezo.
about.val1_body: Urugendo ruburiwe ni rendez-vous iburiwe. Tufata buri gufata nk'urugendo rw'ingenzi — kuko ku mugenzi, ni ko biri.
about.val2_body: Umugenzi wese afatwa neza, mu mahoro no mu bwuzu. Nta gahato ku rurimi, ubumuga, cyangwa ubwishingizi.
about.val3_body: Ibiciro birambye, kwishyura buteranye, nta mafaranga yihishe. Uzi igiciro mbere yo gufata kandi ntukora impapuro.
about.val4_body: Dushaka abakozi mu gace, dukorana n'amashyirahamwe y'ubuzima bwa Michigan, kandi tusubiza mu miryango tukoreramo.
about.team_body: Kuva ku badispatch basubiza mu masegonda 90 kugeza ku bashoferi bazi izina ryawe ku rugendo rwa kabiri — Abyride yubatswe ku bantu bafata akazi kabo nkakabaye.
about.team_m1_bio: Yashinze Abyride n'imodoka imwe mu 2014. Aracyasubiza indimu za dispatch ku mpera z'icyumweru.
about.team_m2_bio: Agenzura ibikorwa, amahugurwa y'abashoferi, n'amasezerano yose y'ubwishingizi mu murongo.
about.team_m3_bio: Yubatse sisitemu ya dispatch kuva ku ntangiriro. Agenzura ikipe ya 18 y'abakoordinateri mu nzira eshatu.
about.team_m4_bio: Yayoboye gukora porogaramu nshya ya Abyride. Yabanje gukorera Ford Mobility na Lyft.
about.tl1_body: Imodoka imwe, umushoferi umwe, inzira imwe ifasha abafite ubumuga hagati ya Dearborn na Henry Ford Hospital.
about.tl2_body: Yahawe amasezerano ya mbere ya Medicaid, yitwararika ingendo za dialyze mu karere ka Wayne.
about.tl3_body: Yageze i Ann Arbor na Lansing. Yongereyeho dispatch mu Icyarabu na Kiamhara.
about.tl4_body: Yashyizwe mu serivisi z'ingenzi z'ubuvuzi mu gihe cya COVID-19. Ingendo zirenga 1,800 ku kwezi ku gihe cy'ikibazo.
about.tl5_body: Yatangije guhindura ururimi mu modoka mu ndimi 14 — serivisi ya mbere yo gutwara mu Michigan gukora ibi mu gihe cyo gufata.
about.tl6_body: Porogaramu ya Abyride yakozwe bimwe bimwe. Imodoka zageze kuri 68 zemewe na ADA mu migi itandatu.
about.partners_body: Dufite amasezerano akora n'amashyirahamwe manini y'ubuzima n'ubwishingizi bwa Michigan. Buri sezerano ryubatswe ku mikorere — igihe, ubuziranenge bwo kwishyura, n'ibyishimo by'abagenzi.
contact.page_sub: Dispatch isubiza iminsi yose, amasaa 24. Ku gufata ingendo, ibibazo by'ubwishingizi, gusaba akazi k'umushoferi, cyangwa ikindi — twandikire ukoresheje uburyo bwiza kuwe.
contact.dispatch_body: Ikipe yacu ya dispatch isubiza mu masegonda 90, igihe cyose. Ku bisabwa byihutirwa, guhuza transport y'ubuvuzi, cyangwa gufata ingendo uwo munsi — telefoni ni inzira yihuse.
contact.dispatch_note: Igihe cyo gusubiza · munsi ya masegonda 90
contact.ch1_desc: Tegura urugendo, shyiraho ingendo z'ubuvuzi zisubirwamo, cyangwa genzura konti yawe ukoresheje porogaramu cyangwa portail ya interineti.
contact.ch2_desc: Ku bibazo by'ubwishingizi, guhuza ubwishingizi, gusaba akazi k'umushoferi, cyangwa ibibazo rusange. Tusubiza mu munsi umwe w'akazi.
contact.ch3_desc: Ushaka gutwara na Abyride? Gusaba bikura iminota 10. Dosiye n'ubwishingizi bisabwa.
contact.ch4_desc: Ibibazo by'itangazamakuru, ibyifuzo by'ubufatanye, n'ibibazo by'amasezerano ya MDHHS bikorerwa ikipe yacu y'ibikorwa.
contact.form_h2: Nta bushake bwo guhamagara? Nta kibazo.
contact.form_body: Uzuza ifishi kandi tugusubize mu munsi umwe w'akazi. Ku bisabwa byihutirwa, hamagara dispatch buteranye.
contact.form_note: Tusubiza mu munsi umwe w'akazi. Ku bisabwa byihutirwa, hamagara (833) 829-7339.
contact.offices_body: Ibiro byacu nyamukuru biri i Detroit. Tukorera mu migi itandatu ya Michigan hamwe n'abakoordinateri ba dispatch bo mu gace.
contact.faq1_a: Hamagara (833) 829-7339 cyangwa ukoreshe porogaramu ya Abyride. Ku ngendo z'ubuvuzi zisubirwamo, dushobora gushyiraho gahunda ihoraho mu guhamagara rimwe.
contact.faq2_a: Yego. Tukishyura MDHHS, Medicaid, Molina na Meridian buteranye. Ntukeneye gusaba cyangwa kwishyura ku ngendo zikurikirwa.
contact.faq3_q: Ni indimi zihe dispatch ishobora gukoreshwa?
contact.faq3_a: Ikipe yacu ivuga Icyongereza, Icyarabu, Kiamhara, Igifaransa na Ispanye. Ku zindi ndimi, dushobora kukuhuza n'umusimbuzi.
contact.faq4_q: Nasaba nte akazi k'umushoferi wa Abyride?
contact.faq4_a: Sura urupapuro rwacu rwo gusaba cyangwa hamagara dispatch. Gusaba bikura iminota 10. Ukeneye dosiye nziza n'ubwishingizi bwemewe.
contact.faq5_a: Detroit, Dearborn, Ann Arbor, Lansing, Flint na Grand Rapids. Tukorera mu turere twa Wayne, Washtenaw, Ingham, Genesee na Kent.
hero.s2_body: Imodoka 68 zujuje amabwiriza ya ADA hamwe n'inzira, imashini zo gutera hejuru, n'uburyo bwo gufatisha. Buri mushoferi wamenyeshejwe — iboneka iminsi yose mu mujyi 6 wa Michigan.
hero.s3_body: Ingendo zikurikirana indege DTW, GRR na FNT. Ibiciro bigenwa igihe cyo gufata — nta kongera igiciro, nta nkurikizi niba indege yawe iranakira.
drv.page_sub: Ingendo z'ubuvuzi zisubirwamo, nta kongera ibiciro, n'ikipe ya dispatch isubiza. Injira mu bashoferi 120+ bari mu nzira.
drv.why_body: Abashoferi ba Abyride ntibashaka ingendo binyuze mu algorithm. Ubona ingendo zisubirwamo, abarwayi b'imisi yose, n'ikipe iri inyuma yawe buri shift.
drv.why_1_body: Ingendo z'ubuvuzi zisubirwa buri cyumweru. Abarwayi n'amasaha bimwe. Abashoferi b'igihe cyose bajya bagera kuri $1,240/icyumweru.
drv.why_2_body: Ibiciro by'ingendo bigenwa, bishyurwa n'ubwishingizi. Igiciro cyawe ntikigenda nk'uko bishaka cyangwa igihe cy'imvura.
drv.why_3_body: Hamagara cyangwa ohereza ubutumwa dispatch igihe icyo aricyo cyose. Umuntu asubiza mu masegonda 90 — si robot, si inyandiko gusa.
drv.why_4_body: Hitamo amasaha yawe. Igice cy'igihe cyangwa cyose, iminsi y'akazi cyangwa ya weekend — wewe ugena igihe uriho.
drv.earn_body: Amafaranga ashingira ku masaha, ubwoko bw'ingendo, n'imodoka yawe. Ari ayo abashoferi b'ukuri ba Abyride baza na yo.
drv.earn_note: Imibare ni hagati mu bashoferi bakora. Amafaranga nyayo ahinduka nk'umujyi, ubwoko bw'ingendo, n'amasaha yakozwe.
drv.steps_h2: Intambwe ine kugeza ku ngendo yawe ya mbere.
drv.steps_body: Inzira yose ifata icyumweru kimwe kuva gusaba kugeza kwemezwa. Dore precisely icyo ugomba gutekereza.
drv.step1_body: Uzuza ifishi ya kuri interineti — bikura iminota 10. Uzakenera inomero y'uruhushya rwo gutwara, amakuru y'imodoka (niba uyizana), n'amakuru y'ibanze.
drv.step2_title: Kugenzura amakuru no dosiye yo gutwara
drv.step2_body: Dukora kugenzura amakuru asanzwe kandi tureba dosiye yawe yo gutwara. Dosiye nziza irasabwa. Ibisubizo biba mu minsi 2-3 y'akazi.
drv.step3_body: Zana imodoka yawe kuri rimwe mu birimba byacu 6 kuri saa kabiri yo gusuzuma. Niba winjira mu ikipe, tuzaguha imodoka kandi tugushimangire ibikoresho by'ubufasha.
drv.step4_body: Uzuza amahugurwa y'igice cy'umunsi — gufasha abakerarugendo, amabwiriza ya dispatch, porogaramu. Hanyuma uri mu kazi. Ingendo zawe za mbere ziri kumwe n'umushoferi w'intore.
drv.req_body: Tujya hejuru kuko abagenzi bacu biterwa na twe. Niba uhuje ibi bisabwa, dushaka kukumva.
drv.req_1: Uruhushya rwo gutwara rwa Michigan rwemewe (nibura imyaka 3)
drv.req_2: Dosiye nziza yo gutwara — nta DUI, gutwara nabi, cyangwa more than 2 amakosa mato mu myaka 3
drv.req_4: Imodoka yawe: ya 2015 cyangwa inyuma, inzugi 4, nta bunguri bukomeye bw'imbere
drv.req_5: Ubwishingizi bwemewe bw'imodoka hamwe nibura ubushyikirano bw'intaragiti ya leta
drv.req_note: Nta modoka ihuje ibisabwa? Baza ibyerekeye porogaramu yacu y'imodoka zifasha abafite ubumuga.
drv.vehicle_h2: Izana iyawe cyangwa injira mu ikipe yacu.
drv.vehicle_own_body: Tugane imodoka yawe bwite ku ngendo z'imisi yose no gutwara abarwayi basanzwe. Igomba kuba ya 2015 cyangwa inyuma, sedan cyangwa SUV inzugi 4, kandi isuzumwe na twe.
drv.vehicle_fleet_body: Kodesha imodoka ifasha abafite ubumuga ikurikiza amabwiriza ya ADA. Ibiciro by'ingendo biruta, winjira mu ngendo z'ubuvuzi n'iz'intebe z'amakofa, kandi isuku yose irihwa na Abyride.
drv.faq1_a: Abashoferi benshi bemerewe barangiza kwinjira kandi bagira ingendo yabo ya mbere mu minsi 7-10 nyuma yo gusaba.
drv.faq2_a: Yego. Abyride ifata amafaranga y'urubuga ku ngendo yose. Igiciro cyawe ku ngendo kigaragara mu buryo busobanutse mu porogaramu y'umushoferi mbere yo kwemera ingendo iyo ariyo yose.
drv.faq3_a: Yego. Ushobora gutunganya ubwoko bw'ingendo mu porogaramu y'umushoferi — isanzwe, ubuvuzi, cyangwa yifasha. Ntiwigeze ugomba kwemera ingendo utishimye.
drv.faq4_q: Imodoka yanjye niba igiye gusenyuka mu nzira?
drv.faq4_a: Hamagara dispatch vuba. Tuzatunganya umushoferi w'undi ku mugenzi wawe kandi tukugusanganirize ubufasha bw'inzira. Imodoka z'ikipe zirimo ubufasha bwose bw'inzira.
drv.faq5_q: Mbega ndikeneye uruhushya rwihariye rwo gutwara abarwayi?
drv.faq5_a: Nta ruhushya rwihariye rusabwa, ariko abashoferi bose barangiza amahugurwa yacu yo gutwara abarwayi, yireba gufasha abakerarugendo, gukoresha ibikoresho, n'amabwiriza y'ibyihutirwa.
drv.cta_note: Gusaba bikura iminota ~10. Nta nkurikizi mbere yo kwemezwa.
fleet.page_sub: Inzego ine z'imodoka zubatswe kugirango zihuze n'ibikenewe — ingendo za buri munsi, ingendo z'itsinda, gutwara ku kiraro, no gutwara abantu bafite ubumuga.
fleet.x_tagline: Ingendo z'isanzwe kuri abantu 4 ku giciro gito.
fleet.comforts_tagline: Imodoka nshya ifite aho kwicara kenshi kuri abantu 4.
fleet.xl_tagline: Ingendo z'itsinda kuri abantu 6 ku giciro gito.
fleet.van_tagline: Imodoka ziringanijwe cyane ku bakoresha intebe z'amakopu.
fleet.cta_body: Duhamagare kuri (833) 829-7339 igihe icyo aricyo cyose — tuzafata imodoka ikwiye ingengo yawe.
